news.title:
JSW Infrastructure's Fujairah storage was hit by drone attacks but FY26 EBITDA guidance of ₹2,600 cr is intact.
Despite West Asia disruptions, group cargo performance, steel price rise, and ramp-ups support future growth.
news.summary:
JSW Infrastructure's Fujairah storage was hit by drone attacks but FY26 EBITDA guidance of ₹2,600 cr is intact.
Despite West Asia disruptions, group cargo performance, steel price rise, and ramp-ups support future growth.

news.title: JM Financial reduces JSW Infra's share price target despite achievable FY26 guidance.
news.summary: JM Financial reduces JSW Infra's share price target despite achievable FY26 guidance.

news.title:
JM Financial bullish on JSW Infra, cuts target price.
Strong performance expected for group-linked cargo.
news.summary:
JM Financial bullish on JSW Infra, cuts target price.
Strong performance expected for group-linked cargo.

news.title:
JSW Infrastructure Ltd hits 52-week low of Rs 236.65 on Apr 6, 2026.
The stock declined 3.97% in two sessions, underperforming its sector.
news.summary:
JSW Infrastructure Ltd hits 52-week low of Rs 236.65 on Apr 6, 2026.
The stock declined 3.97% in two sessions, underperforming its sector.

news.title:
Govt to provide $800 subsidy per container to boost production of 1.5M containers in 5 years.
JSW Infra and CONCOR may benefit from the container production initiative.
news.summary:
Govt to provide $800 subsidy per container to boost production of 1.5M containers in 5 years.
JSW Infra and CONCOR may benefit from the container production initiative.

news.title:
Motilal Oswal retains Buy on JSW Infra, TP ₹360, citing capacity, logistics growth.
Targets ₹8,000cr revenue, ~25% EBITDA margin by FY30; ~13% vol CAGR FY25–28.
news.summary:
Motilal Oswal retains Buy on JSW Infra, TP ₹360, citing capacity, logistics growth.
Targets ₹8,000cr revenue, ~25% EBITDA margin by FY30; ~13% vol CAGR FY25–28.

news.title:
JSW Infrastructure starts operations at its new port rail siding in Kudathini, Ballari, Karnataka.
The development focuses on improving logistics and cargo handling efficiency.
news.summary:
JSW Infrastructure starts operations at its new port rail siding in Kudathini, Ballari, Karnataka.
The development focuses on improving logistics and cargo handling efficiency.

news.title: JSW Infra shares face scrutiny after debris impacted a Fujairah storage tank in UAE.
news.summary: JSW Infra shares face scrutiny after debris impacted a Fujairah storage tank in UAE.

news.title:
JSW Infrastructure reports damage to a storage tank at Fujairah Liquid Terminal due to debris from an intercepted drone.
Emergency protocols ensured safety, with no injuries reported. Insurance coverage is in place, and a structural assessment is ongoing.
news.summary:
JSW Infrastructure reports damage to a storage tank at Fujairah Liquid Terminal due to debris from an intercepted drone.
Emergency protocols ensured safety, with no injuries reported. Insurance coverage is in place, and a structural assessment is ongoing.

news.title:
JSW Infra's Fujairah oil terminal caught fire due to Iranian drone debris amid US-Israel-Iran conflict.
JSW Infra shares fell 1.37% to ₹251.35 on Monday; global conflicts risk Indian firms in sensitive regions.
news.summary:
JSW Infra's Fujairah oil terminal caught fire due to Iranian drone debris amid US-Israel-Iran conflict.
JSW Infra shares fell 1.37% to ₹251.35 on Monday; global conflicts risk Indian firms in sensitive regions.

news.title:
JSW Infrastructure's JNPT Liquid Terminal received completion certification from RITES Ltd.
New berths LB3 and LB4 boost capacity from 177 MTPA to 181.4 MTPA, meeting timelines.
news.summary:
JSW Infrastructure's JNPT Liquid Terminal received completion certification from RITES Ltd.
New berths LB3 and LB4 boost capacity from 177 MTPA to 181.4 MTPA, meeting timelines.

news.title: JSW Infrastructure to raise up to Rs 25 cr via equity, approved in Feb 20, 2026 board meeting.
news.summary: JSW Infrastructure to raise up to Rs 25 cr via equity, approved in Feb 20, 2026 board meeting.

news.title:
JSW Infra approves issuance of up to 25 crore shares to fund growth.
The move aligns with SEBI's minimum public shareholding (MPS) norms.
news.summary:
JSW Infra approves issuance of up to 25 crore shares to fund growth.
The move aligns with SEBI's minimum public shareholding (MPS) norms.

news.title:
JSW Infra appoints new independent director for 3 years from Feb 2026.
Plans to issue 25 crore equity shares for expansion and SEBI compliance.
news.summary:
JSW Infra appoints new independent director for 3 years from Feb 2026.
Plans to issue 25 crore equity shares for expansion and SEBI compliance.

news.title:
Nifty opens below 25,650; Sensex drops 180 points. JSW Infra in focus.
Lupin also highlighted as a key stock in market updates.
news.summary:
Nifty opens below 25,650; Sensex drops 180 points. JSW Infra in focus.

news.title:
JSW Infra plans a fund-raising proposal on 20 Feb via QIP, rights issue, or other methods.
JSW Infra's Q3 FY26 profit rose 8.7% to Rs 364.9 cr; revenue up 14.2% to Rs 1,349.7 cr.
news.summary:
JSW Infra plans a fund-raising proposal on 20 Feb via QIP, rights issue, or other methods.
JSW Infra's Q3 FY26 profit rose 8.7% to Rs 364.9 cr; revenue up 14.2% to Rs 1,349.7 cr.

news.title:
JSW Infrastructure shared an investor presentation on Feb 4, 2026, detailing ports, terminals, and logistics.
The presentation highlights strategic asset locations and expansion plans, available on the company's website.
news.summary:
JSW Infrastructure shared an investor presentation on Feb 4, 2026, detailing ports, terminals, and logistics.

news.title:
JSW Infrastructure completes acquisition of JSW Rail Infra Logistics, JSW Minerals Rail Logistics.
The deal involves 100% stakes in JSW (South) Rail Logistics as well.
news.summary:
JSW Infrastructure completes acquisition of JSW Rail Infra Logistics, JSW Minerals Rail Logistics.
The deal involves 100% stakes in JSW (South) Rail Logistics as well.

news.title:
JSW Infrastructure Ltd reports NCLAT remanded a case against its subsidiary ECTPL back to CCI for reassessment.
JSW stated the order has no material impact on its financials, operations, or activities.
news.summary:
JSW Infrastructure Ltd reports NCLAT remanded a case against its subsidiary ECTPL back to CCI for reassessment.
JSW stated the order has no material impact on its financials, operations, or activities.

news.title:
Jefferies sees Dedicated Freight Corridor boosting Jawaharlal Nehru Port by Q1FY27, benefiting logistics and port stocks.
Adani Ports, JSW Infra, SJ Logistics, and CONCOR are key beneficiaries, with Adani Ports showing 29% YoY profit growth in Q2FY26.
news.summary:
Jefferies sees Dedicated Freight Corridor boosting Jawaharlal Nehru Port by Q1FY27, benefiting logistics and port stocks.
Adani Ports, JSW Infra, SJ Logistics, and CONCOR are key beneficiaries, with Adani Ports showing 29% YoY profit growth in Q2FY26.
